product_name: Dark Souls: Sif the Great Grey Wolf SD (Standard Edition)

bullets: Officially licensed Dark Souls collectible statue
Concept inspired by the alternate cutscene unlocked after completing the Artorias of the Abyss DLC
Base replicates the mossy grounds of Darkroot Garden, where the cutscene events took place
Features the Greatsword of Artorias on the highly detailed PVC base
content.description: This statue's concept is inspired by the alternate cutscene, which can be unlocked by first going through the contents of the Artorias of the Abyss DLC before facing Sif. The design of the base helps to recreate the cutscene as well, as it replicates the mossy grounds of Darkroot Garden, which is where the events took place.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• Dark Souls – The Great Grey Wolf, Sif SD PVC painted statue
• Highly detailed PVC base inspired by the Dark Souls art style featuring the
Greatsword of Artorias
• Collectors Box containing F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
